name: or-medicaid-policy
note: Oregon Health Plan (OHA HSD): no provider manual — coverage policy is codified in OAR Chapter 410, one Division per service type, on secure.sos.state.or.us (HTML per-rule). OHA Policies hub links each program → SOS division. No standalone Lab division (lab is inside Div 130 Medical-Surgical). curl works on both hosts (UA header needed).

docs.title: OHA Non-Emergent Medical Transportation (NEMT) program page
OAR 410-120 — Medical Assistance Programs General Rules (enrollment, billing, sanctions)
OAR 410-122 — Durable Medical Equipment, Prosthetics, Orthotics & Supplies (DMEPOS)
OAR 410-148 — Home Enteral/Parenteral Nutrition and IV Services
OAR 410-131 — Physical and Occupational Therapy Services
OAR 410-172 — Medicaid Payment for Behavioral Health Services

_comment: OAR Chapter 410 = OHA Health Systems Division Medical Assistance Programs (~40 divisions). Division pages list every rule with viewSingleRule links — state-policy handler should treat these as HTML→text and optionally crawl per-rule sub-pages. ODHS-side HCBS waiver rules (APD, in-home personal care) live separately in OAR Chapter 411 (selectedChapter=185), not captured here. Fee schedule is EULA-gated at /oha/HSD/OHP/Pages/EULA.aspx. Per-program OHA pages (Policy-*.aspx) mostly carry rule-change PDFs, not consolidated guides.
